title: Management Consultant Analyst
description: JPMorgan Chase is seeking a Management Consultant Analyst for our Sacramento office to support business transformation and operational improvement initiatives. Work hybrid with leading financial professionals. Advance your consulting career at a global financial institution.
responsibilities: Analyze business processes and identify improvement opportunities
Develop recommendations for operational efficiency and cost reduction
Prepare reports and presentations for executive stakeholders
Support project implementation and change management
Collaborate with cross-functional teams on consulting engagements

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, Economics, or related field

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
